title: SE Ranking Backlink Summary
description: Summary statistics for a domain's backlink profile including referring domains, total backlinks, authority scores, and link type breakdown.

target.description: The analyzed domain, host, or URL.

total_backlinks.description: Total number of backlinks pointing to the target.

referring_domains.description: Number of unique root domains linking to the target.

referring_ips.description: Number of unique IP addresses with backlinks to the target.

referring_subnets.description: Number of unique C-class IP subnets with backlinks to the target.

domain_inlink_rank.description: SE Ranking authority score for the target domain.

new_backlinks.description: Number of new backlinks discovered in the last period.

lost_backlinks.description: Number of backlinks lost in the last period.
